overall.description: First-person EVA traversal in a space simulation game, approaching a derelict spacecraft with green navigation lights in an asteroid field. The player navigates using suit thrusters toward the wreckage near a space station, with a contract notification appearing upon close inspection.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space asteroid field approaching station

agents.ego_description: navigating through asteroid field using EVA suit thrusters toward the distant derelict vessel

entered.detail: large dark spacecraft with faint lights visible in the distance
scattered rocky debris field surrounding the approach path
blue glowing gas clouds illuminating the right side of space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in deep space with a first-person view from an EVA suit, showing the HUD and thruster controls. The player drifts forward through a sparse asteroid belt toward a distant derelict vessel, with blue nebula clouds visible on the right and scattered space debris floating nearby.

events.description: reduces thrust to slow down approach as the derelict vessel grows larger in the viewport

agents.ego_description: decelerating thrust to carefully approach the derelict ship with green navigation lights becoming visible

entered.detail: damaged hull sections and structural debris from the derelict vessel

segments.scene_description: The player slows their approach as the derelict vessel dominates more of the view, its green navigation lights now clearly visible. The asteroid belt fades to the background as the ship's wreckage details and structural elements come into focus, with thruster particles visible from suit maneuvering.

events.description: contract available notification appears for claiming the derelict vessel

agents.ego_description: circling the derelict at close range to examine hull damage and green light arrays

entered.detail: scattered wreckage and broken hull plates surrounding the derelict

segments.scene_description: At close range to the derelict's hull, the player circles the wreckage examining structural details and the bright green navigation lights. A contract notification appears offering the claim, while the surrounding space debris field and damaged ship components fill the viewport against the dark starry background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person traversal through a sparse asteroid field that culminates in a close-range inspection of a derelict spacecraft. It begins with the viewer drifting through deep space, guided by an EVA suit HUD and thruster controls while blue nebula clouds and scattered debris float by. As the camera moves forward, the distant vessel grows to dominate the view, causing the asteroid belt to fade into the background as the ship's structural wreckage and glowing green navigation lights come into sharp focus. The scene then shifts to a slow circling motion around the hull, where the bright green lights and damaged components fill the viewport against the dark starry void. Finally, the approach concludes as a contract notification appears on the display, marking the transition from navigation to the active claiming of the wreckage.
